title: Internal Alice mail system — mail.md + boot files updated
q_summary: Alice-ops replied into her own inbox instead of a shared channel — need internal Alice mail system.
a_summary: Created spaces/alice/mail.md as the shared internal mailbox for all Alice agents. Protocol: append MSG-XXX blocks with from/to/status/subject fields. All agents scan mail.md on startup for unread messages addressed to self. Updated G-000-alice-boot.md (v1.3), G-000-alice-ops-boot.md (v1.1), G-000-alice-review-boot.md (v1.1) to add mail.md as startup step 4 and add hard rule: replies go to mail.md, never back into own inbox. Seeded mail.md with MSG-001 from alice-ops summarising SPEC-001 routing verification.
decisions: Single shared mail.md for all Alice agents — simpler than per-agent outboxes
Append-only log with status field for read tracking
Each agent filters by to: self on startup
Hard rule in all boot files: never reply into own inbox
